gate_type: BINARY (DESIGN APPROVED / DESIGN REJECTED - no partial states)

gate_checks.hld_component_coverage: PASS - every UI-facing HLD component (SPA, /v1/answer SSE, router rationale/sections/confidence, TOC authority, upload, doc mgmt, fallback branch, RFC-7807 errors) has >=1 component
gate_checks.wireframes_present: PASS - 5 wireframe files for all designed screens
gate_checks.dpdp_no_pii: PASS - no PII in any wireframe/token/inventory; generic placeholders only
gate_checks.hallucination: PASS - 0 fabricated screens, 0 fabricated FR refs, 0 invented API response shapes
gate_checks.api_contract_fidelity: PASS - differentiators bind to real openapi.yaml fields (citations[], routing.confidence[], routing.rationale, routing.sections[])

itemized_issues: 1. APCA: border token (#C2CAD6) on surface scored Lc 28.8 (< 45 UI threshold) and on surface-alt Lc 23.4 - fails RPwD s40 UI-component bar.
2. APCA: pairing text-primary (dark) on the conf-high green tint for the large confidence numeral scored Lc 25.0 (< 30 large-text threshold).
3. Color-only risk: an early ConfidenceMeter concept conveyed level by fill color alone (WCAG 1.4.1 violation).

round_2_fixes_applied: 1. Darkened the functional border token to #7E8A9C -> Lc 62.6 (surface) / 57.1 (surface-alt); kept #C2CAD6 as a decorative-only --color-border-subtle (non-load-bearing). Both functional pairs now >= 45.

2. Replaced the dark-text-on-tint numeral with a solid-colored large numeral (conf-high #1B7A40 as text on surface) -> Lc 76.4 >= 30. The confidence value is rendered as colored large text on the surface, not dark text on a tint.
3. ConfidenceMeter and FallbackBanner now convey state via label text + numeric value + bar/icon in addition to color (documented in accessibility_report.json wcag_aa_notes 1.4.1).

round_2_verification.wcag_text: 20/20 text pairs PASS 4.5:1; 2 non-text border pairs meet WCAG 1.4.11 (3:1)
round_2_verification.keyboard_nav: documented per screen (GIGW v3.0); no keyboard traps; global :focus-visible ring; 44px min target
round_2_verification.differentiators: citations -> AnswerFinalEvent.citations[]; confidence -> routing.confidence[]; explainability -> routing.rationale + sections[] + confidence[] - all real openapi.yaml fields

advisories_honored_from_phase2: AC-ADV-002 (LOW): mid-stream SSE error (event:error -> Problem) is explicitly surfaced as a role=alert and NOT treated as silent success on a 200-opened stream (Chat + EmptyLoadingError wireframes).
ADV-006 (LOW): multi-document is routing-only (enterprise) for MVP; the personal-tool Chat is single-document (AnswerRequest.document_id) - reflected in screen_inventory non-UI table.

needs_user_decision.question: Ship light theme only for MVP, or also a dark theme?
needs_user_decision.recommended_default: Light theme only for MVP (all APCA values computed for light). Dark theme is an additive Phase-B token set; recommend deferring to keep the MVP design surface small. If dark mode is wanted, a second APCA pass on dark-surface pairs is required.

needs_user_decision.question: Expose the per-request rerank toggle in the personal-tool composer, or keep it backend-default-off?
needs_user_decision.recommended_default: Keep it as a hidden advanced toggle (default off) for MVP; FR-016 is P1 and AnswerRequest.rerank already defaults false. Surface it only if power users ask.

instruction_to_phase_4_and_b: Phase 3 COMPLETE (Standard Path). Import tokens from tokens_css.css (map into tailwind.config.js per ADR-9). Use wireframes/ for layout and component_library.md for variant tables. Bind the 3 differentiators to the named openapi.yaml fields. Do NOT hardcode hex/spacing - reference var(--color-*) / var(--spacing-*). Do NOT break the APCA Lc values in accessibility_report.json during implementation.
